name: Nippo Ltd.
summary: Nippo Ltd. manufactures and trades in industrial components and materials in Japan and internationally. It operates through Mobility, Electronics, Medical and Precision Device, and Others segments. The company provides functional materials, parts, jigs, and equipment for customers related to electronic parts and clean energy; and IC cards and tags, and affiliated system devices for customers related to radio-frequency identification devices. It also offers resin moldings and assemblies centering on electronic control associated parts for automakers and automobile parts makers. In addition, the company provides resin molding, painting, printing, and assembly products for office automation, drug information, and medical equipment; window shade controls, resin pipe parts, water heaters, and functional materials for housing equipment; electrical and electronic parts; semiconductors; precision equipment, including office automation and audio/video equipment; and industrial motor mechanism elements. Further, it offers mechatronics design, analysis, and assessment services. Nippo Ltd. was founded in 1940 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
